payload.title: cli/bapXaura parse error when invoked via php directly
payload.body:
## Problem
`php cli/bapXaura map` and `php -l cli/bapXaura` fail with:


## Root cause
`cli/bapXaura` is a bash script (shebang `#!/usr/bin/env bash`) with embedded PHP `-r` strings. Running it through `php` tries to parse the entire bash file as PHP, which fails on line 497 in `cmd_remove_field`.

## Workaround
Use `bash cli/bapXaura` or `./cli/bapXaura` instead of `php cli/bapXaura`.

## Suggested fix
Add a tiny PHP shim at the top (after the shebang) that detects direct PHP invocation and re-execs via bash, or document the correct invocation in AGENTS.md.
